Sales Analytics Workshop - Requirements Capture Notes
Date: 2026-01-10
Attendees: Marcus (Sales Controlling), Anja (IT Architect), Frank (BW Team Lead), Priya (SAP DSP Lead)

=== MEETING NOTES ===

Started at 09:00. Marcus presented the current Excel-based process - takes 3 days per month to produce the board pack.

KEY REQUIREMENT: Sales leadership wants a live dashboard by Q2 2026. "Live" means same-day data, not real-time.

DISCUSSION: Source system access
- Frank confirmed VBAK and VBAP are the main tables. Delta-enabled via SLT.
- Priya asked about KONV for pricing conditions - Marcus said YES, we need discounts split out
  ACTION: Priya to check if KONV replication is feasible at volume (estimated 50M rows)

TOP 10 CUSTOMER REQUIREMENT:
- Marcus wants to see top 10 customers by revenue with drill-down to order level
- Priya: this is fine in SAC with ranked measures
- Frank flagged: "active customer" definition needs to be in writing before we build
  ACTION: Marcus to get sign-off from sales director on "active customer" definition by 2026-01-20

GRAIN DISCUSSION:
- Section 4 says item-level. Marketing team separately asked for customer-day aggregation.
- Anja: these are two different use cases, we might need two separate views
  OPEN QUESTION: Do we build one unified model or two separate consumption views?

SECURITY:
- Anja confirmed row-level security is mandatory - sales reps should only see their own SalesOrg
- Finance wants margins hidden from standard sales users
  ACTION: Anja to document roles and security concept in architecture doc

TIME INTELLIGENCE:
- Need YoY comparison with fiscal year V3 (April-March)
- Board pack uses both calendar year AND fiscal year - dashboard must support both
- Rolling 12 months is nice-to-have, not must-have for go-live

NON-FUNCTIONAL:
- Frank: current BW query takes 45 seconds. Target is under 5 seconds for SAC story.
- Volume: ~2M new order lines per year. 3-year history = ~6M rows initially.
- Priya: 6M rows is fine without persistence view. Above 50M we would need one.

SAP BW MIGRATION:
- Existing InfoCube 0SD_C03 in BW/4HANA has been maintained for 10 years
- Frank wants to decommission it once DSP is live - needs parallel run period of 3 months
  ACTION: Frank to propose parallel run governance process

OPEN ITEMS / ACTION LIST:
[ ] Marcus: "active customer" definition sign-off (due 2026-01-20)
[ ] Priya: KONV replication feasibility check (due 2026-01-15)
[ ] Anja: security concept document (due 2026-01-25)
[ ] Frank: parallel run governance process proposal (due 2026-01-30)
[ ] Priya + Frank: grain decision - one model or two (resolve in next workshop)

NEXT WORKSHOP: 2026-01-22 at 10:00
Agenda: Review security concept + resolve grain conflict + sign off BRS v1.0

Meeting closed 11:30.
